calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2020 Off Calendar

Plailntiffs Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Schermco, Inc.
Off Calendar Jun-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Schermco, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Jack C. Praetzellis, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Raven Office Centers, LLC.
James Roten, CEO for plaintiff, was present via CourtCall, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Schermco, Inc.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed September 5, 2018, and personally served on defendants Schermco, Inc. and Barry Scherman on September 26, 2018.
Defendant Barry Scherman filed his answer to the complaint on October 26, 2018.
Default as to defendant Schermco, Inc. was entered on November 6, 2018.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Barry Scherman was filed with the Clerk's Office on June 6, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 4, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Raven Office Centers, LLC, and against the defaulted defendant Schermco, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $77,590.63. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - 4,808.58.
Attorney Fees - $3,962.50.
Costs - $668.00.

Total - $87,029.71.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2020 Continued To Aug-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
